description_long: This is a large, modern commercial jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-mounted, swept-back wing configuration. The aircraft features a T-tail design, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin at the rear. The wings are long and slender, with a slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets. The engines are mounted at the rear of the fuselage, integrated into the tail section, which is characteristic of some regional and business jets. The landing gear is partially visible, with a nose wheel extended beneath the cockpit area. The exterior is primarily white with yellow accents along the nose, tail, and lower fuselage, and a subtle geometric logo on the side.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet with yellow accents, low-mounted swept wings, and a distinctive T-tail. Rear-mounted engines and a streamlined fuselage complete its modern appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, T-tail, and rear-mounted engines.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, wing dihedral, and the forward landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wings, T-tail, and rear engine placement, with yellow accents visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the T-tail, engine integration at the tail, and the overall wing span.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the tail section.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with visible nose gear; main gear not fully visible but implied.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, typical of commercial jets.
